subject: move AAF cert to APPC helm chart
commit_message:
move AAF cert to APPC helm chart

move AAF cert out of APPC docker to
APPC helm chart
new AAF cert:
        Validity
            Not Before: Mar 27 18:03:32 2020 GMT
            Not After : Mar 27 18:03:32 2021 GMT


Issue-ID: APPC-1857
Change-Id: I25adc3fce2bed234c6748a87d975c46f1e607260
Signed-off-by: Taka Cho <takamune.cho@att.com>
(cherry picked from commit c6559a91495469d62d73761c022bba47a245d9fc)

entries.message:

Funny thing - I don`t see APPC deployed anywhere here.
SDNC - yes, CDS - yes, but no APPC?

(Perhaps, APPC was removed from Helm Charts in Master, and that thing got propagated to Frankfurt?)
